{{CargoRelic
|name=Kunyu Wanguo Quantu
|class_id=22579
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=01-18
|source=Lottery Machine No.3 (0.06%)
|description=On Jan 18, 1602 AD, the Italian missionary Matteo Ricci, together with Li Zhizao, completed the Kunyu Wanguo Quantu.<br>When Matteo Ricci drew the Kunyu Wanguo Quantu, he used the Western world as a model but changed the pattern of placing Europe in the center of the map and placed East Asia in the center of the world, creating a Chinese pattern for drawing maps. Not only are European place names all marked with Chinese characters on the map, but also the names of the various provinces of China can be found on the map. However, it was lost after being copied...
|fame=47
|art=54
|fth=37
|civ=75
|tech=30
|ss1=Snail RUSH +30<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +24<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss2=Snail RUSH +40<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +32<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss3=Snail RUSH +50<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +40<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss4=Snail RUSH +70<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +56<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss5=Snail RUSH +90<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +72<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50
|ss7=Snail RUSH +90<br>Per Recruitment Incident completed, Priest-Troop Assistance DMG +72<br>Completed Recruitment Incidents: 50/50<br>Snail RUSH +70 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Forestsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: Forest Sanctum, Glorium Cap +15%
|skill2=[[File:Forestsanctum skill II.png|50px]]Place in Forest Sanctum: This Relic's CIV +10
}}
